page: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v6 is an Edsv6-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 10 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 260 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated vector and matrix operations. The instance is equipped with 160.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

For local storage, the E20ds_v6 includes 1181 GB of local disk capacity and is premium storage capable. Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, highlighted by a top-25% tier ranking in Geekbench single-core, image processing, and text processing tests, alongside strong single-threaded gzip compression. Multi-core performance, measured via stress-ng and PassMark, falls within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance, with read-only small block cached bandwidth reaching 1565.06 GB/sec. Notably, the server achieves top-tier performance in LLM inference text generation using small 135M models, while medium and large model inference speeds remain in the average tier.

The qualitative cost efficiency of the E20ds_v6 is defined by its high memory density and dedicated compute resources, making it a balanced option for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of GPU hardware. The combination of 160.0 GB of RAM, 1181 GB of local storage, and dedicated Intel Xeon processors makes this instance suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data compilation, and text or image processing pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v6 is an Edsv6-family virtual machine powered by a 20-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 160.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, and includes 1181 GB of local storage. The x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 and AMX instruction sets. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core capabilities, particularly in image and text processing, and top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. Multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics generally align with average performance tiers. This memory-optimized configuration is well-suited for database operations, in-memory caching, and text processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v6 is an Edsv6-family virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 160.0 GB of RAM, and 1181 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon processors and local storage for demanding database and caching workloads.

160.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
1181 GB of local storage with premium storage capabilities
Strong single-core performance in text and image processing benchmarks
Top-tier text generation speeds for small-scale language model inference
Optimized for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data compilation
